metadata.description: Utah 2026 pronghorn hunt opportunities dataset built from the official Utah DWR hunt table.
assumptionNotes: Weapon was inferred from season timing for buck pronghorn hunts.
Doe pronghorn hunts are currently labeled Any Legal Weapon unless a better official source is supplied.
PB1000 statewide permit is labeled Multiseason for planner compatibility.
